parameters.content:
## Configuration Notifications

Pour activer les notifications, ajoutez un des nodes suivants après "Aggregate Alerts":

### Slack
- Node: Slack > Send Message
- Channel: #production-alerts
- Text: {{ $json.message }}

### Email
- Node: Send Email
- To: production@ici-store.com
- Subject: Alertes Production - {{ $json.total_alertes }} alerte(s)
- Body: {{ $json.message }}

### Discord
- Node: Discord > Send Message
- Webhook URL: votre-webhook-discord
- Content: {{ $json.message }}

### Telegram
- Node: Telegram > Send Message
- Chat ID: votre-chat-id
- Text: {{ $json.message }}

parameters.query: SELECT p.*, f.facture_num, f.magasin, c.nom as client_nom FROM produits p LEFT JOIN factures f ON f.id = p.facture_id LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = f.client_id WHERE p.statut_validation = 'Validé' AND (p.statut_production IS NULL OR p.statut_production != 'Terminé') ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM produits WHERE stock_bas = true AND (LOWER(designation) LIKE '%volet%' OR LOWER(categorie) LIKE '%volet%') ORDER BY designation
